Shaun A. Markley, of Nicholas & Tomasevic, LLP, Tel. 619.325.0492, for plaintiffs, appearing via CourtCall;

Ruling; The matter was not argued. PLAINTIFF ARTHUR ZIVKOVIC Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment is granted. No opposition filed and the settlement complies with the requirements for Proposition 65 settlements. Order and judgment signed in open court.
